---
title: "Huang Xie, PhD"
image: resources/images/profile.png
page-navigation: false
page-layout: full
toc: false
about:
    id: hero-heading
    template: trestles
    image-width: 16em
    image-shape: round
    links:
        - text: "{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub"
          href: https://github.com/xieh97
          aria-label: "GitHub"
        - text: "{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn"
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/huang-xie-28b7872bb
          aria-label: "LinkedIn"
        - text: "{{< fa brands orcid >}} ORCID"
          href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7609-8049
          aria-label: "ORCID"
        - text: "{{< fa brands google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
          href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_wmP81AAAAAJ
          aria-label: "Google Scholar"
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I'm a postdoctoral researcher in the [Multimodality Research Group](https://www.helsinki.fi/multimodality) at the University of Helsinki.
I earned my PhD in 2026 from the [Audio Research Group](https://research.tuni.fi/arg/) at Tampere University, where I also completed my MSc in Data Engineering and Machine Learning in 2020.
I hold an MEng in Software Engineering from the University of Science and Technology of China (2014).
Prior to my academic career, I spent over seven years in the industry as a full-stack software engineer.
I'm passionate about bridging AI research and real-world applications.

## 🕊️ Research Interests

- 🤖 Multimodal Deep Learning
- 🎬 Audio & Video Understanding
- 🔍 Self-Supervised Learning, Zero-Shot Learning
- 💻 Software Development

## 🎓 Education

- 🐦‍🔥 Ph.D. in Signal Processing and Machine Learning ∙ Tampere University ∙ 2026
- 🦉 M.Sc. in Data Engineering and Machine Learning ∙ Tampere University ∙ 2020
- 🦩 M.Eng. in Software Engineering ∙ University of Science and Technology of China ∙ 2014
- 🕊️ B.Eng. in Aircraft Design and Engineering ∙ Beihang University ∙ 2010

## 👥 Experience

- 🎓 Postdoctoral Researcher ∙ University of Helsinki ∙ 2026 -- Present
- 🎓 Doctoral Researcher ∙ Tampere University ∙ 2021 -- 2025
- 🎓 Research Assistant ∙ Tampere University ∙ 2019 -- 2020
- 💻 Fullstack Software Engineer ∙ Bohai Commodity Exchange ∙ 2015 -- 2018
- 💻 Fullstack Software Engineer ∙ Industrial Software Research Institute ∙ 2014 -- 2015
- 💻 Software Engineer Intern ∙ Shanghai Advanced Research Institute ∙ 2013 -- 2014
- 💻 Software Engineer Intern ∙ CASIC Second Academy ∙ 2011 -- 2012

## 🤝 Academic Services

- 🎯 Conference Reviewer: ICASSP (2021--26), DCASE (2022--26), IJCNN (2025--27)
- 📋 Journal Reviewer: TASLP
- 🌐 Workshop Organizer: DCASE Challenge (2022--26)

:::
